figures.caption: Fig. 3: Main architecture for sequential-to-global pretraining. The student network iteratively updates its state tokens, computing the distillation loss at each step against a static teacher embedding. Stop-gradients prevent backpropagation through time.

Fig. 4: Combining multi-zoom patches with focused grid of patches for informative context for the transformer. a) Shows the input image with the bounding-boxes of the multi-zoom crops (blue) and the foveal grid crops (red) overlayed, b) shows the extracted grid patches, and c) shows the multi-zoom patches. Note that the patches are allowed to span outside the image area by filling them with zero padding.
